S.FORM: = Empprngaw kari = Yaku ni bubu mu, empprngaw kari han!
S.PHON: = əmppɾŋaw kaɾi = jaku ni bubu mu, əmppɾŋaw kaɾi ħan!
S.FORM: = Empprngaw kari = Yaku ni bubu mu, empprngaw kari han!
S.PHON: = əmppɾŋaw kaɾi = jaku ni bubu mu, əmppɾŋaw kaɾi ħan!
